Question 1 of 6

What best describes your business?

This helps us understand which AI solutions will have the biggest impact for you.

Local Service Business

Trades, clinics, agencies

🛒

E-Commerce Store

Products sold online

🤝

B2B Company

Sells to other businesses

💼

Agency / Consultancy

Professional services

🚀

Startup / SaaS

Early-stage or tech company

✨

Something Else

We'll figure it out

Question 2 of 6

What's your biggest growth challenge right now?

Be honest — this helps us pinpoint your highest-impact opportunities.

Not generating enough leads

Pipeline is inconsistent or too thin

Poor website conversions

Getting traffic but not enough enquiries

Too much manual / repetitive work

Drowning in tasks that should be automated

Weak online presence

Outdated site, no Google visibility

Scaling the business

Revenue has plateaued, need growth

Missing calls & enquiries

Can't respond fast enough 24/7
